body:
D.A.V. PUBLIC SCHOOL, BSEB COLONY, PATNA

NOTICE

SPEAK UP, BRING A CHANGE!!


Subject:- Podcast Competition for Class 'X'
 on  'Human Trafficking: Awareness and Prevention' 

To create awareness about a very serious social problem, the school's 'Hindi Literary Club' is organizing a 'Podcast Competition' for all Hindi sections of Class X. The main topic for this year is:
 "HUMAN TRAFFICKING: AWARENESS AND PREVENTION" 

Event Details (Grand Finale):-
  Date:-July 13, 2026
 Venue:- School Conference Hall (*Second Floor*)
  Main Focus:- Creating awareness about *Human Trafficking, helping victims, and the role of young people.

All Class Teachers of Class 10 (Hindi Sections) are requested to choose interested and talented students from their classes who can speak or write well on this topic.
  Please send the final list of selected students (Hosts, Speakers, or Scriptwriters) to the *'Hindi Literary Club'* by *July 5, 2026*.

Let us come together to talk about this important issue. For any help or questions, you can contact 
Gunjan Kumari and 
 D.N. Tripathi 

"Be Aware, Stay Safe — Our Voice, Our Promise!"

Hindi Literary Club
D.A.V. Public School, BSEB Colony
